violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed the flour did not have a lid in the dry storage.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed cases of food product on the floor in freezer and tomato soup on the floor in the dry storage area.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Observed a wet towel right by the hand sink at the beginning of inspection.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed numerous food items not date marked

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed seal was very damaged on the cooler on the line.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Observed a cardboard box that was up in the hood system at time of inspection.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Observed a rag coming out the cooler into a pan on the line. I was told it as for condensation.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Observed plates and bowls not being stored inverted at time of inspection.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Observed to go container on the floor at time of inspection.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
